title: engelhardia spicata var. aceriflora
intro: Engelhardia spicata var. aceriflora, also known as the variegated Engelhardia or the Maple-leaf Engelhardia, is a plant species belonging to the family Juglandaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the Engelhardia spicata var. aceriflora are typically used, either as a decoction or a tea, to harness its medicinal properties.
